creator: moggie@elasticmind.net
text:
On 29/12/2012 17:11, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/ircd-ratbox,
>
> Please note that PR ports/174803 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174803
>

Thank you very much for reporting this. It should be corrected in 
ircd-ratbox-3.0.8.
